race.comment: HEAVENLY IMPACT (1) showed little early speed and was always well back last start when tenth, beaten 5 lengths, over this journey at this track. Gets some weight relief with the 2kg claim and is sure to take plenty of stopping. POCKETMONEY (3) disappointed last start when out of the placings over 1630m at Doomben. Finds the right race this time and can get the job done. MORE LOVE (5) has recorded three minor placings from four runs this campaign. Continued the trend last time out when third over 1400m at this circuit. Well placed and there is no reason why she cannot find winning ways. CHICAGO KING (8) found winning form last start and races well here.
